text: oils in addition contain certain useful substances such as lignans (sesame oil), sterols, tocopherols (vitamin E) oryzanole (rice bran oil), carotenoids - all of which reduce cholesterol and reduce oxidant damage due to ageing, inflamation which occur in chronic diseases. Vanaspati is prepared by hydrogenation of vegetable oils. During hydroge- nation, the liquid oils become solid because the mono and polyunsaturated fatty acids are converted into saturated fatty acids and isomers called trans fatty acids. Vanaspati is used as a substitute for ghee in cooking and the preparation of bakery products, sweets and snack foods.
